name: civicnews
description: Assistant skill to connect with The Civic Desk local-first backend

tools.name: get_queue
tools.description: Fetch the daily story queue containing leads and drafts

tools.name: get_evidence
tools.description: Fetch evidence excerpts linked to a specific lead

lead_id.description: The ID of the lead to fetch evidence for

tools.name: submit_draft
tools.description: Submit a new article draft based on evidence to the editor's workbench

lead_id.description: The lead ID or null if independent story

format.description: Format: brief, watch, explainer, investigation, or opinion

content.description: Article body content (Markdown format with citations like [text](evidence:id))

tools.name: check_guardrails
tools.description: Check draft for citation coverage, verbatim overlap, and legal/ethical guardrails

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to verify
